MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answer To Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-02-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF PAUL WILEY'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answer To Cross-Complaint as follows:

In this motion filed to be heard 10 court days before trial, Paul Wiley seeks to amend his answer to the cross-complaint. The motion is DENIED. Wiley's counsel knew of the purported grounds for amendment as much as a year ago (eight months at a minimum) and discovery would need to be re-opened and the trial delayed. (See, e.g., Mobil Oil Corp. v. Handley (1978) 76 Cal.App.3d 956, 957.)

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
